race.comment: DAYTONA PETE (2) trialled well and flew home from well back to be 0.7L off the winner in a tougher race on resumption. Fitter for that effort off a long break and the rise to 1200m is a bonus. Back in good order and with further improvement anticipated, there's plenty to like about him. FRIAR'S LEGACY (8) looks ready to fire on resumption following a nice trial win coming in. Chris Parnham sticks from that effort and he progressed nicely last time in work. Draws beautifully and can return with a bang. INTOXICATING (11) disappointed at the end of last campaign but was showing promising signs prior to that. CJP hops on board for her return and the concussion plates coming off is a positive sign. Looks to set up favourably and she can make a statement. SNOW GOD (1) was strong from the back last start as favourite and can go one better. HURRICANE HARLEY (6) can build on the fresh performance in this easier assignment today.
